data.name: AcuminatorValidationPassedMessage
data.value: The "{0}" project passed Acuminator validation successfully.

data.name: AcuminatorVersionInfo
data.value: Acuminator version "{Version}" is used for the analysis.

data.name: AnalysisOfCodeSourceRuntimeError
data.value: An error happened during the Acuminator analysis of "{CodeSource}".

data.name: CancelledCodeSourceValidationInfo
data.value: Acuminator validation of the "{CodeSource}" has been cancelled. The result of the "{ProjectName}" project validation: {Result}.

data.name: CodeSourceFailedValidationMessage
data.value: The validation has been finished. "{CodeSource}" has failed the validation.

data.name: CodeSourceNotFoundError
data.value: Code source to use for Acuminator validation has not been found at {0}.

data.name: CodeSourceNotSpecifiedError
data.value: The code source is not specified.

data.name: CodeSourceValidationWasCancelled
data.value: The Acuminator validation of "{CodeSource}" has been cancelled.

data.name: DistinctDiagnosticsReportTitlePart
data.value: Distinct Diagnostics

data.name: ErrorDuringAcuminatorAnalyzersCollection
data.value: An error occured during the collection of Acuminator analyzers.

data.name: ErrorsCountReportTitlePart
data.value: Errors Count

data.name: FailedToInitializeAcuminatorGlobalSuppressionMechanismError
data.value: Failed to initialize the Acuminator global suppression mechanism for the code source "{CodeSource}".

data.name: FailedToLoadAcuminatorAnalyzersError
data.value: Failed to load Acuminator analyzers. The analysis of the code source "{CodeSource}" cannot be performed.

data.name: FailedToLoadSolutionFromCodeSourceError
data.value: Failed to load the solution from the code source "{CodeSource}".

data.name: FailedToObtainAcuminatorVersionWarning
data.value: Failed to obtain the Acuminator version. The analysis will be performed without Acuminator version information.

data.name: FailedToObtainCompilationWithAnalyzersError
data.value: Failed to obtain the compilation with analyzers.

data.name: FailedToObtainRoslynCompilationDataForTheProjectError
data.value: Failed to obtain the Roslyn compilation data for the project with the "{ProjectName}" name and the "{ProjectPath}" path.

data.name: FinishedAcuminatorValidationOfTheProjectInfo
data.value: Finished Acuminator validation of the "{ProjectName}" project. The result of the project validation: {Result}.

data.name: FoundErrorsReportSubtitle
data.value: Found Errors

data.name: InitializeAcuminatorAnalyzersStatusMessage
data.value: Initializing Acuminator analyzers...

data.name: LoadedProjectsCount_Information
data.value: The number of loaded projects: {ProjectsCount}.

data.name: MSBuildInstanceRegistrationError
data.value: An error occured during registration of the MSBuild instance.

data.name: MSBuildPath_Info
data.value: MSBuildPath: "{MSBuildPath}".

data.name: MSBuildRegistrationAtProvidedPathFailedError
data.value: An error occured during the registration of the MSBuild instance. Failed to register MSBuild by using the provided path "{MSBuildPath}".

data.name: MSBuild_VisualStudioNameAndVersion_Info
data.value: Found MSBuild instance with name "{VisualStudioName}", version "{VisualStudioVersion}".

data.name: NoFilePlaceholder
data.value: No file

data.name: NoInstalledMSBuildFoundError
data.value: No installed MSBuild version has been found on the machine.

data.name: NoProjectInCodeSourceReferencesAcumaticaPlatformError
data.value: No project in the provided "{CodeSource}" references the Acumatica Platform.

data.name: NotSupportedCodeSourceType
data.value: Not supported code source {0}. You can specify only C# projects (*.csproj) and solutions (*.sln) as code sources.

data.name: NotSupportedOutputFormat
data.value: Not supported output format "{0}". You can specify only the "{1}" and "{2}" values as output formats.

data.name: ObtainedRoslynCompilationDataForTheProjectDebug
data.value: Roslyn compilation data for the project "{ProjectName}" has been obtained successfully.

data.name: ObtainingRoslynCompilationDataForTheProjectDebug
data.value: Obtaining Roslyn compilation data for the project "{ProjectName}".

data.name: ProjectDoesNotReferenceAcumaticaPlatformValidationError
data.value: The {ProjectName} project does not reference Acumatica Platform. Validation can not be performed

data.name: RegisteringMSBuildAtTheProvidedPathStatusMessage
data.value: Registering MSBuild instance at the provided path "{MSBuildPath}".

data.name: RuntimeErrorHappenedDuringValidationMessage
data.value: A runtime error has been encountered during the validation.

data.name: SearchingForMSBuildInstancesStatusMessage
data.value: Searching for MSBuild instances installed on the current machine.

data.name: StartAnalyzingTheCodeSourceStatusMessage
data.value: Start analyzing the code source "{CodeSource}".

data.name: StartLoadingTheCodeSourceAtPathStatusMessage
data.value: Start loading the code source "{CodeSource}".

data.name: StartValidatingSolutionStatusMessage
data.value: Start validating the solution.

data.name: StartedAcuminatorValidationOfTheProjectInfo
data.value: Started Acuminator validation of the project "{ProjectName}".

data.name: SuccessfullyFinishedSolutionValidationStatusMessage
data.value: Validation of the solution has been finished successfully.

data.name: SuccessfullyLoadedCodeSourceAtPathStatusMessage
data.value: The code source "{CodeSource}" has been loaded successfully.

data.name: SuccessfullyRegisteredMSBuildAtProvidedPathStatusMessage
data.value: The MSBuild instance at the provided path "{MSBuildPath}" has been registered successfully.

data.name: TotalErrorsCountReportTitlePart
data.value: Total Error Count

data.name: UnregisterMSBuildInstanceError
data.value: An error has occurred on attempt to unregister MSBuild.

data.name: ValidationPassedSuccessfullyMessage
data.value: The validation passed successfully!

data.name: ValidationWasSuccessfullyCancelledDebugInfo
data.value: The validation was successfully cancelled.

data.name: WelcomeMessage
data.value: Welcome to the Acuminator code analysis runner, the CLI tool that runs Acuminator diagnostics!
